violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reach-in cooler door handles (sticky and with food particles) can opener and holder and magnetic knife blocks noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen under and around tables and equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler door gaskets shelving under prep table near wok outside of slicer and shelving under slicer noted not clean.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Shelf under prep table with clean white bowls noted not clean. Also handles of of equipement in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outsides of rice/sugar bins reach-in sliding glass door cooler and interiors of some tall reach-in freezers noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the ware-washing area noted with some small screw holes in need of caulking/sealing.
